JohnEBGood:

Gaucho Marx:

Bill Orcutt's Four Louies has to be a take on Four Organs, no?

a.j.:

  3:36pm
Craig:

Thank you for Playing Frederic Rzewski's 'Coming together' the other week - amazing piecde that I had never heard. There's a live version on youtupe with Angela Davis reading the text! And thanks for letting us know about the new Horse Lords!
♥ 3:38pm
PaulRobeson1926:

ls Mr.Clay home?

Craig:

Thank you for Playing Frederic Rzewski's 'Coming together' the other week - amazing piecde that I had never heard. I found a live version on youtube with Angela Davis reading the text! And thanks for letting us know about the new Horse Lords!

Webhamster Henry:

MOvies: air conditining! Also, CAREFUL was my favorite film of the year, but a 4K restoration is the wrong way to go, it should have been a 16mm transfer.
  4:59pm
WM:

As you probably know, The Last Movie is one of the films listed in The Fifty Worst Films of All Time (1978) by Harry Medved with Randy Dreyfuss.
🎸 ♥ 5:02pm
chris in the redwoods:

↳ ledzeppelinsucks @4:50
my finger's in that bucket of bud light and ice, doc. can you put it back on, please?
  5:02pm
WM:

Fifty Worst Films of All Time @ Internet Archive:
https://archive.org/details/fiftyworstfilmso0000medv
  ♥ 5:02pm
StringOFperils:

Good evening failure pod !
  5:09pm
Erik habits VT:

I really got a kick outta the screening of Dennis Hopper’s “The Last Movie” (1971)? back when it was initially re-issued / re-printed on celluloid (circa ballpark early 1990s). No-Drugs needed - as the trip is already pre-loaded into the film itself. may the influence & spirit of Alejandro Jodorowsky (especially the fantastic latter films!) live on ♾️!
♥ 5:12pm
PaulRobeson1926:
